---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What ArcticDB method should be exposed?**
Link to the relevant method in the [ArcticDB docs](https://docs.arcticdb.io/latest/api/library/) if applicable.

**What problem does it solve?**
What can an AI assistant do with this tool that it cannot do today?

**Suggested tool name and parameters**
```python
tool_name(library: str, symbol: str, ...)
```
